heading: Numbering vessels
label: 12301 Numbering vessels
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1230146:1466Section 12301 requires that undocumented vessels that are propelled by machinery be issued an identification number by the proper issuing authority in the State in which the vessel is primarily operated.
Amendments2018—Subsec. (b). substituted “may” for “shall” and inserted “of” after “barge”.Pub. L. 115–2821992— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 102–587
amendments: Amendments2018—Subsec. (b). substituted “may” for “shall” and inserted “of” after “barge”.Pub. L. 115–2821992— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 102–587

children.label: a
children.text: An undocumented vessel equipped with propulsion machinery of any kind shall have a number issued by the proper issuing authority in the State in which the vessel principally is operated.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary may require an undocumented barge of more than 100 gross tons operating on the navigable waters of the United States to be numbered.
